title: Azorella microdonta

The classification of Azorella microdonta includes its placement in the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Furthermore, it is classified as a member of the order Apiales and the family Apiaceae. This plant is also known for its unique characteristics and distribution within its native region.
